Tab Master for chrome. Quickly search your tabs and switch with ease without lifting your hand. Resembles spotlight from MacOS. Has recently closed tabs and also all open tabs in the suggestions. 

Press Cmd + Shift + K to open up the dialog. Cltr + Shift + K on Windows. 
If you just installed it, as per browser rules, you might need to reload the tabs where you wish to use it.

Also, use Alt + Q (Option + Q on Mac) for switching to the MRU (Most Recently Used) Tab.

Redesign bookmarks and auto-organize them into folders.

Beta version of Smart Sidebar – Fast, Searchable Bookmarks

Smart Sidebar gives you an always-available, customizable bookmarks panel on every website. Quickly search, open, and organize your bookmarks without leaving the page.

Features

📚 Persistent sidebar accessible on any site

🔍 Instant search for fast bookmark finding

🗂️ Folders & drag-and-drop organization

➕ Quick add new bookmarks and folders

🎨 Customizable position & appearance

⌨️ Keyboard navigation support

It allow you to save tracking rules by creating characteristic cards

This extension allows you to track the URLs saved in your browser bookmarks, and you can configure personalized keywords sets to filter the content conveniently, instead of opening the URLs one by one to know what content updates you care about.

Search and navigate between tabs, history, and bookmarks quickly.
Loads Chrome bookmarks into the NicksLab Bookmark Manager.

NicksLab Bookmark Loader is a companion Chrome extension for the NicksLab Bookmark Manager. It lets you import your Chrome bookmarks directly into your bookmark workspace without exporting files manually each time.
When you open the NicksLab Bookmark Manager and click Load Chrome, the extension reads your Chrome bookmark tree and sends it to the page so it can be organized, searched, filtered, and stored locally in your browser.
Your favorites when you need them, out of the way when you don't.

DynamicFavorites replaces the built-in favorites bar with one that stays hidden until you need it. Move your mouse to the top of the page and it slides into view. You get full access to your bookmarks without the clutter.

What it does:

• Hide-on-demand bar that appears on hover (with adjustable trigger area and delay)
• Display your existing bookmarks and folders
• Open folders on hover or click (your choice)
• Drag and drop to reorganize, including dropping URLs from the address bar to create new bookmarks
• Right-click for quick actions: open, open all, rename, delete
• Rename bookmarks directly from the bar
• Access your browser's native favorites manager with one click

Optional new tab page:

The extension includes a new tab page override (off by default). This exists so the favorites bar can appear on new tabs with the same look and behavior as on regular pages. The new tab page also includes a clock, search bar, top sites, and recently closed tabs.

If you use another new tab extension, install it after this one. The last-installed extension's new tab takes priority.

Customize to your taste:

• Bar height, spacing, and font size
• Animation speed and transition behavior
• Full-width or content-width bar, with alignment and corner radius options
• Light, dark, or system theme
• Visibility toggle for the manage button
• New tab: clock format, search engine, number of top sites and recent tabs

About this extension:

This is a personal extension I built for myself, so it is highly opinionated. Sharing it in case others would find it useful. Feedback or ideas are appreciated, but unless I find a use for it myself, I would not want to feature creep the extension.

Changelog:

v1.0.5
• Smoother drag-and-drop: live reorder animations, drag-into-folder support
• Toggle animations on/off in settings

v1.0.4
• Fixed middle-click on a folder accidentally firing inside nested subfolders

v1.0.3
• Site blacklist: disable the bar on specific sites
• New "Manage" menu: add the current page, create folders, disable site, open favorites manager
• Drag URLs from the address bar onto the bar to save them

v1.0.2
• Bar now (in most cases) hides properly on pages with iframes (Google Docs, Office 365)
• Confirmation prompt when opening a folder with many links at once
• Various UI polishes

v1.0.1
• New Tab page override with clock, search, top sites, and recent tabs
• Fixed settings occasionally failing to load on first install
• Better detection of fast mouse movement into the trigger zone

v1.0.0
• Initial release
Linkcart allows you to shortlist multiple tabs so you can copy all tabs urls( links ) at once.

# linkcart
Open source: https://github.com/bksubramanyarao/linkcart

Linkcart allows you to shortlist multiple tabs so you can copy all tabs urls( links ) at once.

How to use.
1. Select the tab that you want to shortlist
2. Open linkcart click on add link
3. Now click on copy all links to copy all urls
4. Click on clear all links to remove all shortlisted tabs

### 1.0.0
1.	fixed images problems

EchoBar: Supercharge Your Bookmarking Experience! 🚀
Tired of losing track of your favorite websites? Meet EchoBar, the ultimate…

EchoBar: Supercharge Your Bookmarking Experience! 🚀
Tired of losing track of your favorite websites? Meet EchoBar, the ultimate tool for managing your bookmarks with ease and speed!

🔍 Search Made Easy: With EchoBar, you can quickly find your saved websites using the built-in search bar. Just type a keyword, and let EchoBar do the rest!

🔖 Bookmark Organizer: No more messy bookmark lists! EchoBar neatly categorizes your bookmarks, showing their safety status, URLs, and the folders they’re stored in. It’s like having a personal assistant for your browser!

🔒 Safety Indicators: Wondering if a site is secure? EchoBar displays a safety status icon next to each bookmark, so you know at a glance whether a site uses HTTPS.

☕ Crafted with Care: Built by a passionate (and maybe slightly over-caffeinated) developer, EchoBar is designed to be intuitive, efficient, and a pleasure to use.

✨ Key Features:

Instant Search: Find your bookmarks fast with keyword-based searching.
Clean Interface: Enjoy a simple, clutter-free design with a focus on usability.
Safety Check: See which bookmarks are secure with a quick glance.
Organized View: View all your bookmarks sorted by their respective folders.
Smooth User Experience: Light, fast, and easy to navigate!
Whether you're a power user or just someone who loves staying organized, EchoBar is the perfect companion for your browsing needs. Say goodbye to bookmark chaos and hello to streamlined browsing!

💬 Feedback & Support: We’d love to hear your thoughts! Please leave a review or reach out with suggestions to make EchoBar even better.
A browser extension to manage and organize your workspaces.

MyWorkBench - Browser Tab Management Made Simple

MyWorkBench is a powerful browser extension that helps you organize and manage your browser workspaces efficiently. Create custom workbenches to instantly launch multiple websites in your preferred configuration.

Key Features:
• Create and save custom workspaces with multiple URLs
• Choose how workbenches open: new window, current window, or ask each time
• Pin important tabs automatically
• Import all tabs from your current window into a new workbench
• Quick access to commonly used websites across different categories
• Drag-and-drop interface for easy organization
• Merge workbenches with simple drag-and-drop
• Custom URL management with categorization
• Clean, intuitive interface with modern design

Perfect for:
• Developers managing multiple documentation and tool websites
• Professionals switching between different work contexts
• Students organizing research and study resources
• Anyone who frequently works with multiple websites simultaneously

MyWorkBench helps you eliminate tab clutter and instantly access the websites you need, exactly how you want them arranged.
Save tabs into groups - Launch with one click - Sync across devices - Privacy mode - Drag & drop... 100% free.

TabRocket  v2.0 — Save and Organize Tabs

Stop losing your tabs. TabRocket lets you save any tab or entire browser sessions into named groups and reopen everything with a single click — no more
hunting through 30 open tabs.

  🚀 What you get (100% free, forever):

  ✔ Save tabs into groups — save one tab or your entire window in seconds
  ✔ Launch All — reopen every tab in a group with one click
  ✔ Sync across devices — your groups follow you via Google account
  ✔ Drag & drop — reorder groups and links within groups
  ✔ Stealth Mode — instantly blur all groups for privacy (Ctrl+Y)
  ✔ Password lock — protect sensitive groups with a password
  ✔ Floating widget — access your groups from any webpage
  ✔ Import bookmarks — turn bookmark folders into tab groups
  ✔ Background images — personalize cards with custom images
  ✔ Backup & restore — export and import all your data as JSON
  ✔ Right-click to save — add any page via context menu
  ✔ Dark & light theme
  ✔ Search across all groups and tabs

Why TabRocket?

Many tab managers lock sync and privacy features behind a paywall. TabRocket gives you everything — free. 

Built for people who work with many tabs: developers, researchers, students, writers, and anyone who needs a clean, organized browser without paying for
it. 

  Perfect for:
  — Saving research sessions
  — Organizing work vs personal tabs
  — Quickly hiding browser activity in shared spaces
  — Managing multiple projects

No ads. No tracking. No paywalls. Just tab management that works.

Minimal New Tab for Mac. ESC Twice to Minimize
Minimal New Tab for Mac. Press ESC Twice to Minimize Window.

Designed for Multiple Profiles Chrome User. This extension replaces Chrome's default New Tab page with a minimalist dark-themed interface. Main features:

Quick-access shortcut grid: the new tab page displays a grid of circular site icons. On first install it ships with YouTube as a default shortcut; each icon shows the site's favicon and is labeled with the site name for easy identification.
Add a shortcut: clicking the "+ Add shortcut" button at the end of the grid opens a dialog where the name and URL can be entered together; if the URL has no protocol, https:// is automatically prepended.
Edit / remove a shortcut: right-clicking any shortcut icon opens a small context menu with "Edit" and "Remove" options. "Edit" reopens the same form pre-populated with the existing name and URL so both can be changed at once; "Remove" deletes the shortcut immediately.
Double-Esc window minimize: pressing Esc twice within 500 ms minimizes the current browser window (equivalent to Cmd + M on macOS). On the new tab page this is handled directly; on all other pages it is achieved via a content script that forwards a message to the background service worker.
Local persistence: every user-defined shortcut is stored only in the browser's local localStorage; data is automatically restored after the browser is closed or restarted.

Duplicate the current tab via ShortCut.

After the first installation, right-click the bottom of the browser and select "Hide Footer."

Press the Esc key twice on any webpage to minimize the current browser window. (If your cursor is currently in the browser's address bar, you'll need to press Esc one extra time.)

本扩展接管 Chrome 浏览器的默认新标签页（New Tab），用一个极简暗色界面替换之。主要功能：

快捷访问网格：新标签页以圆形图标网格方式展示常用网站。首次安装时内置 YouTube 作为默认快捷方式；每个图标显示站点的 favicon 并在下方标注名称便于辨认。
添加快捷方式：点击网格末尾的「+ Add shortcut」按钮，弹出对话框，可在同一弹窗内同时输入名称和 URL；若 URL 缺省协议，会自动补全 https://。
编辑 / 删除快捷方式：在任意快捷方式图标上点击鼠标右键，会弹出包含「Edit」与「Remove」两项的菜单。点击「Edit」后会在同一表单内同时修改名称与链接；点击「Remove」则会立即移除该快捷方式。
双击 Esc 最小化窗口：在任意页面中于 500 毫秒内连续两次按下 Esc 键，即可调用 Chrome 的 windows API 将当前浏览器窗口最小化（macOS 上效果等同 Cmd + M）。新标签页内直接调用，其他页面通过 content script + background service worker 转发消息实现。
数据持久化：所有用户自定义的快捷方式仅保存在浏览器本地的 localStorage 中，关闭/重启浏览器后会自动恢复。

可通过快捷键快速复制当前标签页，方便对比。

首次安装后请右键浏览器底部选择隐藏 Footer 以隐藏浏览器自带底栏。

在任意网页按两次 Esc 键即可最小化当前浏览器窗口（如果你的光标正处于浏览器地址栏，则需要多按一次 Esc 键）
快速搜索浏览器书签与历史记录，并提供本地剪贴板与常用片段管理。
极简自用插件，在浏览器工具栏弹窗中快速检索书签、浏览历史、剪贴板历史与自建常用片段。所有数据仅保存在本机，不上传任何服务器。

Optimize your use of Bookmarks. Search, Clean Up and Check!

"Not Twice" is an extension that helps you manage and utilize your…

Optimize your use of Bookmarks. Search, Clean Up and Check!

"Not Twice" is an extension that helps you manage and utilize your bookmarks.

1. Press the CTRL key and select a word. If there are any related bookmarks that you already saved, "NOT TWICE" will show you a notification. Then, open the "NOT TWICE" pop-up and check the list.

2. If there are too many bookmarks to find, you can quickly find them by searching for keywords on the 'AllBookmarks' tab.

3. "NOT TWICE" will show you a list of bookmarks that you haven't used in 3 months, delete the bookmarks that you don't need anymore and organize the list neatly.

4. From the "Recently Added" tab, you can check and easily access the list of recently saved bookmarks.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

"Not Twice"는 쌓여가는 북마크를 잘 관리하고, 잘 활용할 수 있게 도와주는 확장 프로그램입니다.

1. CTRL 키를 누른 상태로 단어를 선택해보세요. 이미 저장한 북마크 중 관련된 북마크가 있다면 "Not Twice"가 알림을 보냅니다. 그리고 바로 'NOT TWICE' 팝업을 열어서 해당 키워드를 포함하는 북마크 목록을 확인해보세요.

2. 저장한 북마크가 너무 많아서 찾기 어렵다면, 'AllBookmarks' 탭에서 키워드를 검색해서 빠르게 찾을 수 있습니다.

3. 'CleanUp' 탭에서 3개월 동안 사용하지 않은 북마크 목록을 확인하고 더 이상 필요 없는 북마크를 삭제해서 깔끔하게 정리해보세요.

4. 'Recently Added' 탭에서 최근에 저장한 북마크 목록을 확인하고 쉽게 접근할 수 있습니다.

Chrome Extension to add vim keybindings and New Tab commands

CommandCenter is a utility for adding the following functionality:

- "Fuzzy search" that uses fzf that is more forgiving and uses substring search
- CommandCenter: list of commands, bookmarks, current and recently closed tabs
- TabCenter: allows you to search, jump to, close and reopen tabs
- Keybindings to open both of these on any page, not just New Tab
- Utility "Site Scripts" injected into configured webpages
- Vim-style keybindings to every webpage

ctrl + z 단축키를 클릭하면 북마크가 저장됩니다
ctrl + x 단축키를 클릭하면 우측 상단 아이콘이 사라집니다
使用 Chrome 书签管理器，用户可以为网站分组，编辑、删除和检索已保存的书签。该插件还支持一些高级功能，例如通过标签过滤书签等。总之，Chrome书签管理器是一个非常有用和方便的工具，可以帮助用户实现更好的书签管理和浏览体验
Use links as ToDos in your Bookmarks

Simple Chrome extension to add links to your bookmarks as 'ToDo' or 'Done'.

**How To Add a ToDo**
After installing the LinkToDo Chrome extension, right-click any hyperlink and choose LinkToDo. Alternatively, hold the `a` key while clicking a hyperlink

A 'LinkToDo' folder will be added your bookmarks. Within that, two sub-folders: 'ToDo' and 'Done. Links are added to the 'ToDo' folder.

Links on a webpage that have been added will show a checkbox to visually indicate that it's on your 'To Do' list. Check/tick the box to move it to your 'Done' list.

Nvimux brings (n)vim-style keyboard navigation to Chrome.
Navigate the web entirely with your keyboard using familiar keybindings.

Features:
- Scroll with j/k, jump to top/bottom with g/G, half-page with Ctrl+D/U
- Hop mode (Ctrl+E) — jump to any link with color-coded hints
- Page find (Ctrl+F) and web search (Ctrl+G) with history & suggestions
- Workspace (Ctrl+W), tab delete (Ctrl+X), change tabs (;)
- Tab history navigation with Ctrl+I / Ctrl+O
- Tab switching with Ctrl+H / Ctrl+L
- Link navigation with Ctrl+J / Ctrl+K

All navigation runs locally — no data is collected or sent anywhere.
Adds a floating button to show your Bookmark Bar quickly when you need it.

Bookmark Shelf gives you a clean, modern way to browse your bookmarks directly on any page. A small floating button sits unobtrusively in the corner of your browser. Click it, and your bookmarks bar appears as a sleek shelf docked to the top or bottom of the screen - wherever you’ve placed the button.
